name: Double Chocolate Peanut Butter Thumbprint Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chunky or smooth peanut butter, divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt.
3. Melt 1 cup of chocolate morsels in a small, heavy saucepan over the lowest possible heat, stirring constantly until smooth.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat together sugar, 1/3 cup of peanut butter, softened butter, and vanilla extract.
5. Beat in melted chocolate until well combined.
6. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
7. Gradually add the flour mixture to the chocolate mixture, stirring until just combined.
8. Stir in the remaining chocolate chips.
9. Cover and chill in the refrigerator until firm enough to shape (about 30 minutes).
10. Shape dough into 1-1/2 inch balls and press a thumbprint into each ball.
11. Place the cookies on ungreased baking sheets, filling each indentation with about 1/2 teaspoon of peanut butter.
12. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 to 15 minutes or until edges are set but centers remain soft.
13. Cool on wire racks for a few minutes before removing completely.
